    A

    abstractFigure - package abstractFigure
     
    area() - Method in class abstractFigure.Figure
    Calculates the area of a figure.
    area() - Method in class abstractFigure.Oval
    Calculates the area of an oval.

    Calculates the area of a rectangle.
    area() - Method in class abstractFigure.Triangle
    Calculates the area of a triangle.

    B

    C

    Circle - Class in abstractFigure
    A class to describe a circle, which extends the Oval class.
    Circle(int, int, int) - Constructor for class abstractFigure.Circle
    Default constructor.
    Circle(int, int, Color, boolean, int) - Constructor for class abstractFigure.Circle
    Parameterized constructor.
    Color - Enum Class in abstractFigure
    An enum class to describe the color of a figure, which can be cyan, wellow, magenta or black.
    CYAN - Enum constant in enum class abstractFigure.Color
     

    F

    Figure - Class in abstractFigure
    A class to generally describe a figure, including the module, area and perimeter values.

    Parametized constructor.
    Figure(int, int, Color, boolean) - Constructor for class abstractFigure.Figure
    Default constructor.

    Gets the value of the base of a rectangle.

    getRadius2() - Method in class abstractFigure.Oval

    M

    MAGENTA - Enum constant in enum class abstractFigure.Color
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class abstractFigure.Test
    Tests all Figure subclasses by instantiating them with both constructors, printing their info, resetting their position, and calculating their module, area and perimeter individually.
    module() - Method in class abstractFigure.Figure
    Calculates the module of a figure.
    module() - Method in class abstractFigure.Oval
    Calculates the module of an oval.
    module() - Method in class abstractFigure.Rectangle
    Calculates the module of a rectangle.
    module() - Method in class abstractFigure.Triangle
    Calculates the module of a triangle.
